falsum

Represents the false boolean value and can prefix a falsity check.

Syntax: falsum []

Category

boolean

Related

  • [verum](/corpus/verum.html)
  • [nihil](/corpus/nihil.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/falsum/falsum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Represents the false boolean value and can prefix a falsity check.

# falsum — false literal
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   literal :← 'falsum'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Scalar stdout smoke (see body).
#

incipit {
    fixum _ inactive ← falsum
    nota inactive
}

Expected output:

falsum
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/falsum/falsum.fab"]
